description_long: This is a sleek, futuristic airplane with a sharply angular, delta-shaped wing design and a glossy red exterior. The fuselage is streamlined, tapering to a pointed nose at the front and widening toward the rear, where two large, rectangular exhaust ports are visible. The wings are sharply swept back and feature multiple small fins or canards, contributing to an aggressive, high-performance appearance. The cockpit is positioned near the front of the fuselage and appears to be enclosed, with a dark, tinted canopy. The undercarriage is not visibly extended, suggesting retractable landing gear. The overall design suggests a high-speed, possibly advanced or conceptual aircraft suited for rapid maneuvering.
description: A glossy red, angular airplane with swept delta wings, a pointed nose, and a forward-enclosed cockpit. The design is futuristic, with prominent rear exhausts and multiple aerodynamic fins.
description_view_0: Front view shows the pointed nose, forward cockpit canopy, and sharply swept delta wings with small fins.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the elongated fuselage, swept-back wings, and the angular, aerodynamic profile.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals two large rectangular exhaust ports and the twin vertical stabilizers at the tail.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displays the same angular features, with visible underwing fins and the streamlined body.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing, sharply swept delta wings with multiple small fins and no visible winglets.
attribute_engine_type: Twin jet engines integrated into the rear fuselage.
attribute_tail_design: Twin vertical stabilizers with a low-mounted tailplane, forming an H-tail configuration.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Retractable tricycle landing gear, not visibly extended.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed single-seat cockpit with a dark, streamlined canopy.
